name: KTLYST - U.S. Department of Homeland Security - Suspicious Device Code Context
description: Flag device-code sign-ins that carry at least one high-risk signal: anonymizer / proxy, impossible travel, new device, or non-corporate IP range.

metadata.note: Pair with the KTLYST ACCESS_POLICY in okta_policy_recommendation.json. Access policy blocks the grant type; behavior rule catches the context when an exception is allowed.
